title: Planning, Dependencies, and Adaptive Decomposition · Guided Harness Build
summary: Plan a migration whose dependencies and risks emerge during work. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a dependency-aware adaptive execution plan while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Order outcomes by prerequisite evidence rather than arbitrary file sequence.
Choose milestones that leave a verified, restartable artifact.
Update the plan when evidence changes while preserving the goal and recorded decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
